news.title:
Motilal Oswal sees value as Nifty 50 trades at 17.7x P/E, a 15% discount to historical LPA. Key picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, BEL.
Top sectors: Auto, PSU Banks, Technology; Neutral on Telecom, Cement. Midcap correction noted; largecaps preferred for investments.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal sees value as Nifty 50 trades at 17.7x P/E, a 15% discount to historical LPA. Key picks include Bharti Airtel, SBI, BEL.
Top sectors: Auto, PSU Banks, Technology; Neutral on Telecom, Cement. Midcap correction noted; largecaps preferred for investments.

news.title:
Banking stocks fell up to 32% in 3 months; SBI, HDFC Bank favored.
The slump is linked to FII outflows, geopolitical tensions, and rising energy prices.
news.summary:
Banking stocks fell up to 32% in 3 months; SBI, HDFC Bank favored.
The slump is linked to FII outflows, geopolitical tensions, and rising energy prices.

news.title: Axis Securities highlights SBI among large-cap stocks with up to 57% gains.
news.summary: Axis Securities highlights SBI among large-cap stocks with up to 57% gains.

news.title:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.
news.summary:
Trent, IndiGo, SBI, and Adani stocks saw sharp declines as geopolitical tensions spiked oil prices to $105 per barrel.
Banking, cyclical, and auto stocks faced profit booking; FPIs sold Rs 8,331 crores amid rupee pressure and global uncertainties.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.
news.summary:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.

news.title:
SBI users reported over 500 UPI payment issues on Downdetector.
UPI disruptions cited transaction failures; no official cause disclosed yet.
news.summary:
SBI users reported over 500 UPI payment issues on Downdetector.
UPI disruptions cited transaction failures; no official cause disclosed yet.

news.title:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.
news.summary:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.

news.title:
SBI and other bank stocks rose up to 4% amid market optimism.
Investors hope for easing geopolitical tensions to reduce macroeconomic concerns in India.
news.summary:
SBI and other bank stocks rose up to 4% amid market optimism.
Investors hope for easing geopolitical tensions to reduce macroeconomic concerns in India.

news.title:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.
news.summary:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.

news.title:
SBI report suggests RBI use forex reserves to stabilize rupee amid West Asia crisis; rupee settled at 94.78/USD.
SBI recommends special FX window for OMCs, notes divergence in onshore-offshore markets due to RBI's open position cap.
news.summary:
SBI report suggests RBI use forex reserves to stabilize rupee amid West Asia crisis; rupee settled at 94.78/USD.
SBI recommends special FX window for OMCs, notes divergence in onshore-offshore markets due to RBI's open position cap.

news.title:
SBI economists suggest $100M NOP limit apply to banks' trading books only.
They argue RBI's rule on whole bank books poses operational challenges.
news.summary:
SBI economists suggest $100M NOP limit apply to banks' trading books only.
They argue RBI's rule on whole bank books poses operational challenges.

news.title:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.
news.summary:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.

news.title:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.
news.summary:
Nifty to end FY26 down over 5%, worst in a decade, snapping a 2-year positive streak.
Realty, IT fell ~20%, PSU banks gained 30%; Shriram Finance, SBI rose, while TCS, Trent fell.

news.title:
RBI plans new rules on onshore forex positions amid rupee volatility, says ex-SBI Chairman Dinesh Khara.
Abizer Diwanji notes banks with $18-20B net forex positions may face losses due to this move.
news.summary:
RBI plans new rules on onshore forex positions amid rupee volatility, says ex-SBI Chairman Dinesh Khara.
Abizer Diwanji notes banks with $18-20B net forex positions may face losses due to this move.

news.title:
SBI sees valuation shift, leading to a downgrade from Buy to Hold.
The change reflects market dynamics, valuation concerns, and peer analysis.
news.summary:
SBI sees valuation shift, leading to a downgrade from Buy to Hold.

news.title:
State Bank of India held its General Meeting on March 27, 2026, via VC/OAVM to approve material related party transactions.
The meeting saw participation by directors, quorum presence, and e-voting facilitated by NSDL; results to be shared on exchanges and websites.
news.summary:
State Bank of India held its General Meeting on March 27, 2026, via VC/OAVM to approve material related party transactions.
The meeting saw participation by directors, quorum presence, and e-voting facilitated by NSDL; results to be shared on exchanges and websites.

news.title:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).
news.summary:
PSU banks, including Canara Bank, UCO Bank, and SBI, fell up to 5% due to rising bond yields reaching 6.9%.
The Nifty PSU Bank index dropped 3.6%, with 7 stocks declining 10-21% in 2026, led by Punjab & Sind Bank (-21%).

news.title:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.

news.title:
CBI searches Reliance Telecom office, ex-directors' residences over alleged bank fraud of ₹114.98 cr.
FIR registered against former directors Satish Seth and Gautam B Doshi for alleged fraud.
news.summary:
CBI searches Reliance Telecom office, ex-directors' residences over alleged bank fraud of ₹114.98 cr.
